name: FreeTierDev
headline: Directory of free-tier dev tools & limits, compared
subheadline: Build for $0 with the right tools. Built for indie devs, students.
solution: Directory of free-tier dev tools & limits, compared.

cta.label: Submit a listing
cta.note: Free submissions reviewed weekly. Featured slots paid.

items.name: Vercel
items.blurb: Deploys frontend frameworks and serverless functions; free tier covers personal and hobby projects.

items.name: Netlify
items.blurb: Static site and serverless platform with a free tier suitable for personal sites and prototypes.

items.name: Cloudflare Pages
items.blurb: Globally distributed static site hosting with unlimited bandwidth on the free plan.

items.name: Cloudflare Workers
items.blurb: Edge serverless compute platform with a generous free tier for running lightweight functions.

items.name: GitHub Pages
items.blurb: Hosts static sites directly from a GitHub repository at no cost for public and private repos.

items.name: GitHub Actions
items.blurb: CI/CD automation platform with free compute minutes for public repositories and personal accounts.

items.name: Supabase
items.blurb: Open-source Firebase alternative with Postgres, auth, storage, and edge functions on a free tier.

items.name: Neon
items.blurb: Serverless Postgres with branching; free tier is designed to cover development and small workloads.

items.name: Turso
items.blurb: Edge SQLite database platform with a free tier covering multiple databases for side projects.

items.name: Railway
items.blurb: App hosting platform with a free usage allowance for deploying backends, databases, and workers.

items.name: Render
items.blurb: Cloud platform for hosting web services and static sites with a free tier for starter projects.

items.name: Fly.io
items.blurb: Container deployment platform with free allowances for running small apps close to users globally.

items.name: Upstash
items.blurb: Serverless Redis and Kafka with a free tier suited to low-traffic apps and development use.

items.name: Resend
items.blurb: Transactional email API for developers with a free tier covering small sending volumes per month.

items.name: PostHog
items.blurb: Open-source product analytics platform with a generous free tier and self-hosting option.

items.name: Sentry
items.blurb: Error tracking and performance monitoring platform with a free tier for small development teams.

items.name: MongoDB Atlas
items.blurb: Managed MongoDB cloud service with a shared free cluster for learning and prototype projects.

directory.sponsorNote: Get featured at the top of this list.

seoDescription: Directory of free-tier dev tools & limits, compared. Built for indie devs, students. Free to use.

faq.a: Indie devs, students. If that's you and "hard to compare free limits" sounds familiar, this was built for your exact situation.

faq.q: Why would I pay for this?
faq.a: Build for $0 with the right tools.

faq.q: How fast do I get it?
faq.a: Right now — everything on this page works immediately, free.

validationMetric: Index + 200 visits; target 1 paid/featured listing or 3 affiliate clicks in 14 days
deploymentTarget: Vercel (static) — primary; Cloudflare Pages / Netlify alternates
killCriteria: <150 visits AND 0 listing/affiliate revenue interest after 14 days
biggestRisk: Cold-start (needs both content and traffic); affiliate payouts are thin early
first10: Seed great entries, then tell each listed brand they're featured (warm outreach for upgrades)
